mnemonics.title: Traversal Orders
mnemonics.content:
NLR - No Looking Required (Pre-order: Node, Left, Right)
LNR - Look No Reason (In-order: Left, Node, Right)
LRN - Look Right Now (Post-order: Left, Right, Node)

mnemonics.title: BST Property
mnemonics.content: Left is Less, Right is More - Always remember that in a BST, left children are smaller and right children are larger than their parent.

mnemonics.title: Tree Height Calculation
mnemonics.content: For complete trees: Height = Floor(Log₂n) - Remember that for n nodes, the height is the integer part of log base 2 of n.
